sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَوْمُ الرِّيَاضَةِ فِي المَلْعَبِ المَدْرَسِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Dan sporta bio je na školskom terenu.
sentences.translationEn: Sports day was at the school playground.

sentences.translation: Učenici su se takmičili u trci.
sentences.translationEn: The students competed in a running race.

sentences.arabic: جَرَى سَامِيٌّ بِسُرْعَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ وَوَصَلَ أَوَّلًا.
sentences.translation: Sami je trčao velikom brzinom i stigao prvi.
sentences.translationEn: Sami ran very fast and arrived first.

sentences.translation: Direktor je dao Samiju zlatnu medalju.
sentences.translationEn: The principal gave Sami a gold medal.

sentences.arabic: صَفَّقَ الجَمِيعُ لَهُ وَهُوَ يَبْتَسِمُ بِفَخْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Svi su mu zapljeskali dok se on ponosno osmjehivao.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone clapped for him as he smiled with pride.
